title: galphimia paniculata var. humboldtiana
intro: Galphimia paniculata var. humboldtiana, also known as "Resinweed" or "Yellow Galphimia", is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Galphimia paniculata var. humboldtiana is often dried and used as a tea, capsule, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
